channel.title: Ifttt on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Ifttt on Pi Stack

item.title: Huginn vs n8n vs Activepieces: Best Self-Hosted IFTTT Alternatives 2026
item.description: IFTTT and Zapier dominate the workflow automation space, but they come with hard limits: monthly execution caps, restricted integrations on free tiers, and your data flowing through third-party servers. If you run servers at home or in the cloud, self-hosted automation platforms give you unlimited triggers, full data control, and the ability to chain complex workflows without per-action pricing.
